embeds.title: Guild Items
embeds.description:
`                                                                     `
The Guilds of Ost in Edhil

	- True political power in the city
	- Five ranks in each (Guild Master, Council, Member, Initiate, Recruit), each with their own item
	- Items cannot be obtained except by rising through the ranks of the guild.

The effect temporarily grants full voluntary control of the body in which their consciousness resides. embeds.title: <:d20:704040692946698361> 150,000 - 350,000: NPC Slots
embeds.description:
`                                                                     `
An RP-only character slot in addition to your PC slots! PC race restrictions don't apply, but there are some restrictions:
 • These characters are for RP ONLY
 • They can NOT join or accompany onto tables
 • They can NOT fight in the arena
 • They can NOT gain any exp at all, ever, in any way
 • Mods reserve the right to refuse an NPC profile deemed unsuitable for any reason...

Bonus: Once an NPC slot has been purchased, any or all of your other empty character slots can be used as NPC profiles.

embeds.title: <:d20:704040692946698361> 200,000 - 250,000: RP Channel & Upgrades
embeds.description:
`                                                                     `
Never able to find an open channel to RP in? Want one of your very own so you always have a place to go? A House in the Residential District? A Shop in the Mercantile Quarter? A Venue in the Entertainment District? A Shrine in the City Temple? Maybe a Ship in the Dockyard? Hut in the wilderness? Look no further! Purchase your own RP channel to always have a place to RP. 
 *Note*: Discord limits servers in the number of channels available, so there IS a finite quantity of these, so a user cannot buy more than one.

fields.name: <:d20:704040692946698361>200,000 - Player RP Channel
